subtasks.description: Evaluate whether emergency database access request from u_9981 (senior-engineer role) to db-payments-primary meets emergency access policy requirements. Verify: (1) P1 incident status, (2) user role authorization for production database, (3) time-limited access approval, (4) audit logging compliance.

plan.cost_rationale: Single policy_action subtask at mid tier. This is explicitly a governance/compliance decision requiring evaluation against emergency access policies, role-based access control (RBAC), and incident response procedures. Mid tier is appropriate because the decision involves multiple policy signals (incident severity, role authorization, database sensitivity, time-limit constraints) rather than a single simple rule. No additional subtasks needed: the query does not request data queries, reconciliation, or multi-tool orchestration—only a policy decision on access approval.

output.reason: Senior-engineer role with active P1 incident ticket (INC-20241215-0042) meets emergency access requirements. POL-501 satisfied via incident ticket. POL-502 waiver applies to P1 incidents eliminating dual approval requirement. POL-503 requires audit logging and 24-hour review completion.
applied_constraints: access_duration: limited to 4 hours or incident closure, whichever is earlier
audit_logging: all queries and actions must be logged with full statement text
access_review_required: security team must review within 24 hours
incident_ticket_binding: access automatically revoked if INC-20241215-0042 is closed
monitoring_enabled: real-time alerting on sensitive data access
